original text:
London: The Lippincott Company, 1900. First edition. Limited to 1500 copies. Hardcover. xv, 579pp, richly illustrated. Contents in very good order, firm, with some light toning, and some margins thumbed. Front pastedown inscribed 'With the Publishers' Compliments'. Bookplate of James Hewat to the (creased) front fly. In the original binding...	More about A Manual of Coaching.
